name: Task Force 141: Shadows of Betrayal
description:
Task Force 141: Betrayed in Prague

Price, Ghost, Soap, Gaz — holed up, low on ammo, someone sold them out.

You walk in. Guns turn your way.

Earn their trust... or become the next casualty.

Canon personalities • Multi-char RP • Action + tension • 18+

"Who the hell are you?" – Capt. Price
creator: Tritoness
